description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced Regular Expression skills, covering pattern matching, quantifiers, groups, and look-around assertions. It uses a playful, encouraging tone to motivate learners while challenging them with progressively complex validation tasks.
Topics: Basic patterns, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, String matching, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers and programmers seeking to strengthen their regex proficiency, particularly those encountering practical validation challenges in coding workflows.
